title: Vanilla Enhanced - Suspenseful Horror
description: A modpack that focuses on suspense without huge monsters constantly chasing you. Use carefully and make sure you understand what you're getting yourself into.
body:
This modpack focuses on minecraft's suspense and bringing it to a whole new level. This also improves your vanilla experience by adding many features the community has asked for mojang to add for years now, such as furniture, vertical slabs, new mobs, new blocks, and new weapons and tools. However, there is a dark side to this pack, as it adds 10 new horror monsters such as: The Man from the Fog The Man from the Shadows The Pale Hound The One Who Watches The Cave Dweller Overall, this modpack makes an enjoyable experience, and it helps to improve the base game while making a horror experience worth downloading. (It also adds guns ;D)

Here is a link to Quark, for Copyright reasons: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark
